phonetic_names.note: Recurrence of a character name's leading SOUND across runs, not the exact token; complements the v1 name-component metric (report §6.6). Counts each PERSON span's final token and may include spaCy NER false positives (e.g. a place mislabeled PERSON) — verify before quoting.

mtld.note: Length-robust lexical diversity (MTLD, McCarthy & Jarvis 2010); higher = more varied vocabulary. Unlike v1 TTR it does not fall merely because a text is longer. Runs under 50 tokens are flagged reliable=false; prefer aggregate_reliable_only when comparing models.

burstiness.method: per-run sentence-length CV and Goh-Barabasi B (spaCy segmentation)
burstiness.note: Variation in sentence length (rhythm). cv = std/mean is the length-robust headline; burstiness = (std-mean)/(std+mean) in [-1,1] is the Goh-Barabasi coefficient (>0 bursty/human-like, <0 metronomic). Higher = more varied rhythm. Runs under 3 sentences are flagged reliable=false.

dialogue_ratio.method: words inside paired double quotes / total words
dialogue_ratio.note: Fraction of words inside double quotes (dialogue) vs narration; a pacing fingerprint. Straight and curly double quotes are paired; single quotes are ignored (apostrophe collision). quoted_passages counts distinct quoted spans.

intra_text_repetition.method: per-text n-gram repeat rate (1 - distinct/total); unigram=content words
intra_text_repetition.note: Repetition WITHIN each story (complements the across-run diversity metrics). rep_rate = 1 - distinct/total n-grams; higher = more repetitive. unigram is over content words only (the 'word obsession' defect); bigram/trigram over all tokens. Runs under 30 tokens flagged reliable=false.

cliche_density.method: stock-phrase / register-word / em-dash hits per 1000 words
cliche_density.note: Cliché / stock-phrase density (per 1000 words) — a GENERIC-PROSE signal, not an AI detector: most phrases are overused human clichés. 'cliche' is the trustworthy multi-word headline; 'slop_words' (single register words) is high-FP and kept separate; 'em_dash' is a structural cadence tell.

ngram_diversity.note: Corpus-level diversity of the N runs. distinct_n (distinct/total n-grams) is HIGHER for more diverse sets; self_bleu is HIGHER for more SIMILAR (less diverse) sets — they move in opposite directions. Both are length-sensitive: compare across run sets of similar size (see tokens.length_spread; a large spread weakens comparability).

opening_lines.method: first-sentence similarity: Jaccard + difflib + semantic cosine (all-MiniLM-L6-v2)
openings: The wheat does not know it is growing on a world that was once a frozen rock.
On the terraforming plains of Kepler's Reach, the morning bells do not ring for God.

*Book One of the Lacuna Cycle*

---

Dawn comes twice to Maren's World, and Sera Voss has never trusted either of them.
The terraforming towers of Khorvane Station exhale at dawn.
The orbital elevator at Kanchipuram hums a single note that has not stopped in four hundred years, and Asha Vendramin has learned to hear si
The harvesters sing at dawn on Kepler's Reach, and Maren Okonkwo-Vey has learned to hate the sound.
The terraforming towers of Kavanaugh Station exhale at dawn, and the whole eastern hemisphere of Threshold tastes the difference.
Dawn comes twice on Tessaly.
The terraforming rains come to Veyra Colony at the seventeenth hour, as they always do, and Sela Marsh stands at the edge of her father's ba

*Book One of the Helion Cycle*

---

The grain ships are late again, and Mara Vesh can feel it in the dirt.
opening_lines.note: Similarity of the FIRST SENTENCE across runs (a tell whole-text similarity dilutes). High jaccard/sequence_ratio/semantic or low distinct_openings = formulaic openings; shared_prefix.max_share shows how many runs share the same opening words. Leading title/heading scaffolding is stripped before segmentation (title_blocks_stripped counts it); suspected_title_openings flags any short title-like opening that survived stripping.

phonetic_names.note: Recurrence of a character name's leading SOUND across runs, not the exact token; complements the v1 name-component metric (report §6.6). Counts each PERSON span's final token and may include spaCy NER false positives (e.g. a place mislabeled PERSON) — verify before quoting.

Runs under 30 tokens flagged reliable=false.

cliche_density.note: Cliché / stock-phrase density (per 1000 words) — a GENERIC-PROSE signal, not an AI detector: most phrases are overused human clichés. 'cliche' is the trustworthy multi-word headline; 'slop_words' (single register words) is high-FP and kept separate; 'em_dash' is a structural cadence tell.

Both are length-sensitive: compare across run sets of similar size (see tokens.length_spread; a large spread weakens comparability).

The wheat on Veradis burns silver at dawn.

---

The red dawn comes to Edus III the same way it always does — sideways, the light bending through the atmospheric processors on the ridg

The sky over Caelindra is the wrong color again.

---

The terraforming machines have been singing for two hundred years, and Kael Maren has never once stopped to listen.

---

The universe does not announce its intentions.

---

The terraforming engines have been singing for sixty years, and Kael Voss has never once stopped to listen.

The dust storms on Veradis come without warning.

The reaper drone dies at dawn.
opening_lines.note: Similarity of the FIRST SENTENCE across runs (a tell whole-text similarity dilutes).
